title: Analytics
summary: Arcium empowers Web3 analytics platforms to securely aggregate and analyze sensitive demographic or financial data off-chain/on-chain. They can generate high-value, macro-level insights and graphs without compromising individual user privacy or exposing granular tracking.
description: The Analytics ecosystem built on Arcium.

bodySections.title: Why confidentiality matters in analytics
bodySections.body: Analytics products become more useful when they can aggregate sensitive information without turning every data point into public exhaust. Confidential compute can preserve insight while limiting exposure.

bodySections.title: What to look for in Arcium-native analytics
bodySections.body: The best analytics examples show how protected inputs still produce meaningful dashboards, reporting, or segmentation without creating a surveillance-heavy or trust-fragile product.
